understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked '+' by navigating the grid while avoiding spike tiles (u/v) that end the run
understanding.mechanics_understanding: MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT causes automatic gravity fall (vertical) until landing on solid tile or hazard; CLICK removes breakable 'x' blocks at target_position; gravity direction (up/down) determines fall; 50 turns per attempt with UNDO for recovery; corridor_scan and landing previews show safe passages
